title: Make release scripts cwd independent
goal: Fix install and package scripts so they resolve the repository root from their own location and work when invoked from the scripts directory or another current working directory.
acceptance: scripts/install.sh can be run from scripts/ and installs the repo-root release binary instead of looking for scripts/target/release/khazad-doom.
scripts/package.sh uses the repo-root Cargo.toml, target directory, README, LICENSE, and dist directory regardless of current working directory.
The installed khazad-doom binary matches the freshly built repo target/release/khazad-doom.
